mapper.select: SELECT ar.*, e.name AS emp_name, d.dept_name FROM attend_record ar LEFT JOIN employee e ON ar.emp_id = e.id LEFT JOIN department d ON e.dept_id = d.id WHERE ar.id = #{id}
SELECT ar.*, e.name AS emp_name FROM attend_record ar LEFT JOIN employee e ON ar.emp_id = e.id WHERE ar.emp_id = #{empId} AND ar.work_date = #{workDate}

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN status='正常' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS normalDays, SUM(CASE WHEN status='迟到' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lateDays, SUM(CASE WHEN status='早退' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS earlyDays, SUM(CASE WHEN status='缺勤' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS absentDays, COUNT(*) AS totalDays FROM attend_record WHERE emp_id = #{empId} AND DATE_FORMAT(work_date, '%Y-%m') = #{yearMonth}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attend_record (emp_id, work_date, check_in_time, check_out_time, status, work_hours) VALUES (#{empId}, #{workDate}, #{checkInTime}, #{checkOutTime}, #{status}, #{workHours})
